response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has extensive experience in software engineering (19 years), with significant contributions to cloud, AI-agent infrastructure, and geospatial platforms. While his AI expertise is less explicitly documented compared to his broader software development background, his recent work at re:cinq on AI-agent frameworks and his entrepreneurial experience with GISCollective demonstrate both innovation and leadership. His technical depth, polyglot programming skills, and open-source contributions are strong assets for a Principal Engineer role focused on AI strategy.
strengths: 19+ years of hands-on software engineering experience with a strong track record in building scalable systems
Direct experience with AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (MCP, AI workflows)
Entrepreneurial background with GISCollective, showing product development and leadership in niche domains
concerns: Lack of clear evidence of AI-specific products or platforms built from scratch (beyond AI-agent tooling)
Limited formal AI education (no advanced degrees mentioned; background is primarily in computer science and fine arts)
No explicit mention of cloud platform strategy or large-scale AI adoption advisory experience
